page.title: Anti-AI rules
page.description: Manage the anti-AI rules that chapter writing consults; decide which join the global baseline and which are reserved for style asset bindings.

stats.totalHint: All rules you can view and edit in the library.
stats.enabledHint: Rules that participate in global or style-bound resolution.
stats.globalHint: Used in chapter writing even when no style is bound.
stats.autoRewriteHint: When matched, can flow into the auto rewrite suggestions.

list.title: Rule list
list.description: Quickly toggle rules, adjust the global baseline, and curate generation hints and rewrite suggestions.

effectivePreview.title: Effective preview
effectivePreview.description: See the global rules chapter generation will receive, plus style-specific rules layered on top when a style is picked.
effectivePreview.styleRulesEmpty: This preview context doesn't add any style-specific rules.

effectTest.title: Effect test
effectTest.description: Paste a passage to see how the rules judge its AI flavor and generate a preview-only revision.
effectTest.noTempRules: Add rules from the list on the left to compare results without changing the rule's enabled state.
effectTest.contentPlaceholder: Paste text to test. A full scene works best for spotting summary voice, explanation voice and template feel.
effectTest.noIssues: No issues found that warrant rewriting.

dialog.description: Rules can join the global baseline or remain optional constraints for style assets.
dialog.aiHintEdit: Describe the direction; AI will refine the rule using the form's current state.
dialog.aiHintCreate: Describe what to discourage or encourage; AI will draft an editable rule.
dialog.aiPlaceholderEdit: e.g. tune this rule to better suppress summary voice without hurting normal interior monologue.
dialog.aiPlaceholderCreate: e.g. reduce flat summaries, on-the-nose psychology explanations, model-style plot recap.
dialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain which kind of expression this rule suppresses or encourages.
dialog.patternsPlaceholder: One keyword per line, commas also work.
dialog.promptInstructionPlaceholder: Concrete expression rules to bake into the chapter generation constraint.
dialog.rewriteSuggestionPlaceholder: What to suggest to the user or the rewrite pipeline once a match is detected.

toast.aiDraftFilled: Draft loaded into the form. Please review before saving.
toast.validationRequired: Please fill in the rule key, name and description.
